testimonial: Don Bosco College Tura, Have been a Pioneer and Leader in Imparting Quality Education to Thousands Of Students Of Garo Hills and Beyond. I Feel Very Proud And Privileged to be an Alumni Of this Great Institution. The College has played a Significant Role in Shaping Me to What I Have Become as a Professional Football Coach. May the College Continue to Grow And Contribute to the Upliftment Of the Society. Best Regards to All.
